title: STAT+: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T is nearing an early but pivotal study readout
summary: A preliminary readout from a study could vindicate Allogene Therapeutics' stubborn belief in its off-the-shelf CAR-T treatment.
summary_ko: Allogene의 오프-더-쉘프 CAR-T 치료제가 임상 시험 결과를 발표할 예정이다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns를 67억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료제를 개발하고자 한다.

title: Philips AI cath lab copilot nets FDA clearance
summary: Developed with Edwards Lifesciences, DeviceGuide is aimed at the challenging task of transcatheter mitral valve repair.
summary_ko: Philips의 AI 카테터 실험실 코파일럿이 FDA 승인을 받았습니다. 이는 의료기기 기술의 발전에 중요한 단계입니다.

title: STAT+: Data show people racing to chatbots for health advice
summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: More people use chatbots for health advice, a health AI startup raises $125 million, and all about deepfaked medical images.
summary_ko: 사람들이 건강 상담을 위해 챗봇을 사용하는 것이 증가하고 있다.

title: Beam posts positive data on base editing treatment for AATD
summary: Updated data showed the biotech's approach to the rare lung and liver condition helped restore functional protective proteins in a small study.
summary_ko: Beam의 베이스 에디팅 치료법이 AATD 환자에서 긍정적인 결과를 보여주었다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta의 RNAi 신약이 초기 성공을 거두었으며, 두 가지 약물이 근무약화 질환을 치료할 수 있는 잠재력을 보였다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고, 자가면역질환 치료를 위한 비스펙티프 항체 개발에 집중하고 있습니다.

title: OrbiMed-backed Pinnacle adds $89M series B to power oral peptide pipeline
summary: Oral peptide specialist Pinnacle Medicines has secured an $89 million series B with backing from investors in the U.S. and China, bringing the company’s total fundraising haul to $134 million.
summary_ko: OrbiMed-backed Pinnacle Medicines는 구강 펩타이드 파이프라인 개발을 위한 8900만 달러의 시리즈 B 자금을 조달했습니다.

title: FDA clears Denali drug in ‘clear step’ for rare disease biotechs
summary: The approval of Denali’s Hunter syndrome treatment, Avlayah, comes after a series of drug rejections and delays that had led to criticism of the FDA’s stance on rare disease therapies.
summary_ko: FDA의 Denali 약물 승인은 희귀 질환 바이오텍 산업에 긍정적인 영향을 미칩니다.

title: Limbic aims to show AI beats humans in delivering therapy
summary:
A March study in Nature Medicine showed that AI designed for therapy can deliver better care than human clinicians in a specific type of therapy.

 UK-based Limbic led the study. The ...
summary_ko: Limbic은 AI를 사용한 치료가 인간의 치료보다 더好的 결과를 보여줄 수 있다는 연구 결과를 발표했습니다. 이 연구는 AI를 사용한 치료의 가능성을 보여줍니다.

title: Merck’s deal for Terns sparks debate over a possible biotech bidding war
summary: Some investors and analysts believe the pharma’s $6.7 billion offer is justified given Terns’ recent stock run. Others are convinced a better proposal is coming.
summary_ko: Merck의 Terns 인수는 바이오텍 산업에서 입찰 전쟁을 예고합니다.

title: CMR Surgical kicks off Versius Plus robot’s US commercial launch
summary: Following an FDA green light last December for its upgraded robot, CMR Surgical has begun rolling out its Versius Plus platform to the U.S.
summary_ko: CMR Surgical은 FDA의 승인을 받은 Versius Plus 로봇을 미국 시장에 출시했습니다.

title: Kodiak’s Phase 3 eye drug success; Innate discontinues anti-CD20 program
summary:
Plus, news about Astellas' setidegrasib and Anavex:

 📈 Kodiak’s eye drug win: The biotech’s experimental drug Zenkuda, whose scientific name is tarcocimab tedromer, beat a sham procedure in patients ...
summary_ko: Kodiak의 실험용 약물 Zenkuda는 임상 시험에서 성공을 거두었습니다. 이 약물은 안과 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 가능성을 열어줍니다.

title: Oral peptides biotech Pinnacle Medicines gets $89M from US, China investors
summary:
The pill version of Novo Nordisk's blockbuster Wegovy showed what was possible when drug chemists turned peptides into oral molecules. Now investors have found their next related bet.

 Pinnacle Medicines, a two-year-old startup based in ...
summary_ko: Pinnacle Medicines는 구강 펩타이드 바이오테크 회사로 8,900만 달러의 투자를 받았습니다. 이 회사는 펩타이드를 구강용 분자로 전환하는 기술을 개발하고 있습니다.

title: STAT+: Denali Therapeutics, Corcept Therapeutics win FDA approvals
summary: In today's Readout Newsletter, Denali and Corcept win FDA approvals, Sarepta eyes a rebound, and Allogene progresses with an off-the-shelf CAR-T.
summary_ko: 데날리 테라퓨틱스와 코르셉트 테라퓨틱스가 FDA 승인을 받았다. 이는 바이오 기술 분야에서 중요한 발전이다.

title: Eli Lilly’s deal man, Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T, and Merck’s Terns buy
summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD" podcast: Eli Lilly's deal man, Allogene's off-the-shelf CAR-T, and Merck's Terns buy.
summary_ko: 엘리 릴리와 알로진의 CAR-T 기술 및 메르크의 테르نز 인수 등 바이오 기술 분야의 최근 동향이 논의되었다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Rocket gene therapy for rare immune disorder
summary: Kresladi has been tested in just nine patients but has had positive results.
summary_ko: FDA에서 Rocket gene therapy를 희귀한 면역 질환 치료를 위한 승인을 받았다.

title: FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs
summary:
Denali Therapeutics’ Avlayah received FDA approval for treating Hunter syndrome, a rare neurological disorder. The biologic medicine uses Denali’s proprietary drug delivery technology to cross the protective blood-brain barrier. 
The post FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 데날리 테라퓨틱스의 아블라야는 FDA의 승인을 받아 새로운 뇌 침투성 약물의 길을 열었다. 이는 희귀한 신경계 질환인 헌터 증후군의 치료에 사용된다.

title: FDA approves Denali's Hunter syndrome drug, handing rare disease community a win
summary: The FDA has approved Denali Therapeutics’ enzyme replacement therapy for a genetic lysosomal storage disease after a string of high-profile rejections for rare disease candidates.
summary_ko: FDA는 Denali Therapeutics의 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인했습니다. 이는 희귀 질환 치료 분야에서 새로운 기회를 열어주는 것으로 보입니다.

title: UCB picks Georgia for $2B biologics site; AbbVie exec visits China
summary: UCB has selected Gwinnett County, GA, as the location for its new biologics factory. The 460,000-square-foot facility is expected to cost $2 billion and will supply biologics to the US market ...
summary_ko: UCB가 조지아에 20억 달러의 바이오로직스 공장을 건설할 계획입니다. 이 공장은 460,000 제곱피트 규모로 미국 시장에 바이오로직스를 공급할 예정입니다.

title: FDA gives Denali accelerated approval for rare disease drug
summary:
The FDA granted accelerated approval to Denali Therapeutics’ rare disease drug Avlayah, bucking a recent trend of rejections in the space that has put the agency under political pressure.

 Avlayah, whose generic name is tividenofusp ...
summary_ko: FDA는 데날리 테라퓨틱스(Denali Therapeutics)의 희귀병 치료제 아블라야(Avlayah)에 대해 가속 승인을 부여했다. 이는 최근 거부되는 추세를 깨는 것으로 정치적 압력을 받고 있는 기관에 대한 승인이다.

title: Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing
summary:
As cell-based therapies grow more complex and manufacturing networks expand, resilience can’t be an afterthought, and cryopreservation can no longer just be a step that gets validated during development and left alone. It needs to play an ongoing role in product consistency, potency, and reliability.
The post Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 세포 및 유전자 치료제 제조에서 동결 보존은 더 이상 개발 중에 검증되는 단계가 될 수 없다. 복잡한 치료법과 제조 네트워크의 확장으로 인해 회복力은 사후 고려 사항이 될 수 없다.

title: Merck’s $6.7B Terns Acquisition Positions It to Challenge a Blockbuster Novartis Cancer Drug
summary:
Merck has been acquiring assets that could help make up for the coming revenue decline as its top product, the cancer drug Keytruda, drops off the patent cliff.  Terns Pharmaceuticals’ lead product candidate, in development for treating a type of leukemia, could offer dosing and efficacy advantages over the Novartis drug Scemblix.
The post Merck’s $6.7B Terns Acquisition Positions It to Challenge a Blockbuster Novartis Cancer Drug appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하여 노바티스의 암 치료제에 도전할 수 있는 자리를 잡았다. Terns의 주요 제품은 Merck의 암 치료제 키트루다의 특허 만료에 대비하여 수익을 보충할 수 있을 것이다.

title: BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market
summary:
BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market

            BYD and VinFast are rapidly expanding their presence in Southeast Asia, where electric vehicles are gaining traction and competition is intensifying, according to Nikkei. Both companies have emerged as the fastest-growing car brands in the region’s six largest markets in 2025, with sales rising about 95% for BYD and 90% for VinFast compared with the previous year.

VinFast sold more than 100,000 vehicles across countries in
summary_ko: BYD와 VinFast가 동남아시아 전기차 시장에서 경쟁을 벌이고 있습니다. 전기차 시장이 성장하고 있습니다.

title: Recordati says it's received a $12B+ takeover bid
summary:
Milan-based Recordati confirmed Thursday that it has received a buyout offer north of $12 billion.

 The company said in a press release that private equity firm CVC Capital Partners has submitted ...
summary_ko: Recordati가 120억 달러 이상의 인수 제안을 받았다. 이는 바이오테크 산업에서 큰 변화가 일어나고 있는 상황에서 나온 뉴스이다.

title: AirGas Declares Force Majeure On Helium Shipments As Qatar Production Collapses
summary:
AirGas Declares Force Majeure On Helium Shipments As Qatar Production Collapses

            Earlier this week we reported that global chip production was in peril as "Qatar Warns Helium Exports Set To Collapse." Best known as the gas that makes party balloons float, helium is far more important as a key input in chipmaking, space rockets and medical imaging. The problem is that Qatar supplies a third of the world’s helium, and the Gulf nation had to halt production after Iranian strikes against
summary_ko: AirGas가 헬륨 수출을 중단하고 생산이 붕괴된 카타르에서 강제 조치 선언했습니다.

title: AstraZeneca delivers dream result as phase 3 COPD hits breathe life into class rocked by flops
summary: AstraZeneca’s chronic obstructive pulmonary disease drug candidate has hit the mark in a pair of phase 3 trials, delivering broad efficacy with a mechanism that yielded mixed data for Roche and Sanofi.
summary_ko: AstraZeneca의 만성 폐질환 치료 약물 후보는 3상 임상 시험에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였습니다. 이 결과는 Roche와 Sanofi의 이전 실험과는 다릅니다.

title: Novartis pens $2B deal for allergy biotech with potential Xolair successor
summary: Novartis has penned a $2 billion deal for a biotech whose next-gen anti-IgE program could offer a worthy successor to Xolair.
summary_ko: Novartis는 알러지 바이오테크 회사와 20억 달러의 거래를 체결했습니다. 이 거래는 Xolair의 후속 제품을 개발하는 데 도움이 될 수 있습니다.

title: Eurasia Energy War?
summary:
Eurasia Energy War? 

            As analysts and traders continue to assess the Gulf energy shock and its implications for the global economy, another alarming development has emerged across the energy sector: Ukrainian kamikaze drone strikes have reportedly disrupted a significant portion of Russia's oil export capacity, according to Reuters.

Reuters calculates that recent Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia's oil and fuel export infrastructure, including attacks on all three of Russia's major
summary_ko: 유라시아 에너지 전쟁이 발생할 수 있는 상황이다.

title: Biopharma funding dropped 20% in 2025 as companies doubled down on big bets: IQVIA
summary: Biopharma funding fell 20% last year, reversing the post-pandemic recovery as the IPO haul dropped to the lowest level of the past 10 years, according to an IQVIA analysis.
summary_ko: 바이오제약 투자가 2025년에 20% 감소하였습니다. 이는 IPO가 10년 만에 최저 수준으로 떨어진 결과입니다.

title: AI Disruption Returns: Cybersecurity Stocks Tumble On Report Of New Anthropic "Step Change" AI Model
summary:
AI Disruption Returns: Cybersecurity Stocks Tumble On Report Of New Anthropic "Step Change" AI Model

            Cybersecurity stocks are slumping in premarket trading on Friday as the AI disruption trade returns after a Fortune report said Anthropic is testing a new AI model that “poses significant cybersecurity risks.”

According to the report, Anthropic is "developing and has begun testing with early access customers a new AI model more capable than any it has released previously," the compa
summary_ko: 신규 AI 모델의 개발로 인해 사이버 보안 스톡이 하락하고 있으며, 이는 AI 기술의 발전과 함께 사이버 보안 산업에 큰 변화를 가져올 수 있다.

title: STAT+: China’s biotech boom is rewriting everything
summary: In today's Readout newsletter, how China's biotech boom is rewriting everything and how an NIH crackdown is disrupting global science collaboration.
summary_ko: 중국의 바이오테크 산업이 급성장하며 새로운 기술과 투자 기회를 창출하고 있다.

title: After local tumor approval, Novocure touts positive data in metastatic pancreatic cancer
summary: After collecting an FDA approval earlier this year for local pancreatic cancer, Novocure is putting forward positive clinical data for its electric field-based treatment in metastatic cases of the aggressive disease.
summary_ko: Novocure의 전기장 기반 치료법이 전이성 췌장암에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였습니다.
